flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Delaware rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.9k → $41.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Delaware rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.0k → $16.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Delaware fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
